sections.title: Talking to her before offering yourself as a sacrifice

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Leave me, human, I have a sacrifice to prepare. If you wish for information, go and see the High Priestess.

sections.title: Attempting to board the boat before offering yourself as a sacrifice

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: The sacrificial boat is not for you! Begone, and do not meddle in our sacred rites.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I really want to ride the boat!

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You display complete ignorance of our sacred rites. Perhaps the High Priestess will consent to enlighten you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm off.

sections.title: Talking to her after offering yourself as a sacrifice

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The High Priestess said I could offer myself as a sacrifice to Zulrah.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: It is rare for a traveller to make such an offer! Very well, I shall explain the ritual to you...

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Once I have brought you to the shrine, I will leave you there as an offering to Zulrah. You cannot use the boat to return.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You can use your magical powers to flee from Zulrah's grasp, though that would defeat the point of the sacrifice, and you'll have to try again.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: When Zulrah inevitably kills you, I may be able to retrieve your dropped possessions. If so, I will hold them here.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Are you ready to face Zulrah?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's go.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: I shall now transport you to Zulrah's shrine and offer your life on behalf of our tribe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I've changed my mind.

sections.title: Talking to her before after offering yourself as a sacrifice, but before killing Zulrah

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You left the shrine. Did Zulrah reject your sacrifice?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been there, but I left.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Well, board the boat and let me take you there again quickly, before Zulrah becomes impatient!

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Once I have brought you to the shrine, I will leave you there as an offering to Zulrah. You cannot use the boat to return.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't have anything for you to collect. If I had any of your items, but you died before collecting them from me, I'd lose them.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. I've returned it to you now.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. Clear some more inventory space and I'll give you the rest.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. Clear some inventory space and I'll give it back.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. You'd better deal with it before returning.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You left the shrine. Did Zulrah reject your sacrifice?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I killed Zulrah.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Is that what you think? Board the boat again, and I am sure you will find Zulrah has overcome whatever pitiful attacks you used against him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me how this ritual works.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Once I have brought you to the shrine, I will leave you there as an offering to Zulrah. You cannot use the boat to return.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: You can use your magical powers to flee from Zulrah's grasp, though that would defeat the point of the sacrifice, and you'll have to try again.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: When Zulrah inevitably kills you, I may be able to retrieve your dropped possessions. If so, I will hold them here.

lines.speaker: Priestess Zul-Gwenwynig
lines.text: Now board the boat and prepare to be sacrificed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm off.
